metadata.description: Thinking-partner and multi-session workflow skills for Claude Code.

plugins.name: grill-me
plugins.description: Interview-style stress-test of a plan or decision. Walks every branch of the design tree, one question at a time, until shared understanding is reached.

plugins.name: handoff
plugins.description: Generates a copy-pasteable handoff block so a fresh Claude Code session can resume work with zero context loss.

plugins.name: parallel-dispatch
plugins.description: Turns a pre-built parallel work plan into copy-paste agent prompts plus a coordinator playbook. Validates file-scope conflicts.

plugins.name: quiz-me
plugins.description: Active-recall quiz on a topic, document, codebase area, or interview prep. One question at a time, adaptive difficulty.
